title: How do i edit the E-mail adresses on my smartphone?
creator: bodes1
content:
Hi folks, i tried to find an adressbook on my smartphone, to add a new E-mail adress.

to contact me, You can use "[edited] @posteo.de" or SMS to:+[edited email and phone# from community support forum] kind regards, Josef
